title: Ukrainian Keto Cucumber Stir Fry
description: A refreshing keto stir fry dish from Ukraine, featuring cucumber and a variety of fresh herbs.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook Ukrainian bacon until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove bacon from skillet and set aside.
Add sliced cucumber to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add chopped parsley, dill, and chives to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Return cooked bacon to the skillet and stir to combine.
Optional: serve with a side of sour cream or sour cream-based sauce for added creaminess.
